mapper.sql: a.id as id, a.zuoye_name as zuoyeName, a.zuoye_photo as zuoyePhoto, a.zuoye_types as zuoyeTypes, a.zuoye_file as zuoyeFile, a.jiaoshi_id as jiaoshiId, a.kecheng_id as kechengId, a.chapter_id as chapterId, a.deadline_time as deadlineTime, a.score_total as scoreTotal, a.publish_status as publishStatus, a.question_ids as questionIds, a.zuoye_content as zuoyeContent, a.zuoye_delete as zuoyeDelete, a.insert_time as insertTime, a.create_time as createTime
